Input.name: customMods
Input.string: #jolt 30% more maximum attack damage +40% to critical strike multiplier 10% increased damage taken

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE New Item Imbued Wand Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}SpellDamageOnWeapon4 Prefix: {range:1}LocalAddedLightningDamage5 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}LocalIncreasedAttackSpeed3 Suffix: {range:1}LocalCriticalStrikeChance3 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 1 {tags:caster_damage,damage,caster}{range:0.5}(33-37)% increased Spell Damage 54% increased Spell Damage Adds 5 to 94 Lightning Damage 12% increased Attack Speed 24% increased Critical Strike Chance

Rarity: RARE New Item Citrine Amulet Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: {range:0.5}AddedLightningDamage5 Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Suffix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None LevelReq: 28 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Ash, Frost and Storm {tags:attribute}{range:0.5}+(16-24) to Strength and Dexterity Adds 2 to 34 Lightning Damage to Attacks +62 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE New Item Cobalt Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}PercentIncreasedLifeJewel Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}AttackSpeedJewel LevelReq: 0 Implicits: 0 4% increased Attack Speed 6% increased maximum Life

Rarity: RARE New Item Large Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableRenewal Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotablePrimordialBond Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_minion_damage Cluster Jewel Node Count: 8 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 8 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage 1 Added Passive Skill is Primordial Bond 1 Added Passive Skill is Renewal

Rarity: UNIQUE Elegant Hubris Timeless Jewel League: Legion Variant: Cadiro (Supreme Decadence) Variant: Chitus (Supreme Ego) (Pre 3.11.0) Variant: Victario (Supreme Grandstanding) Variant: Caspiro (Supreme Ostentation) Selected Variant: 4 LevelReq: 20 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}{range:0.5}Commissioned (2000-160000) coins to commemorate Cadiro {variant:2}{range:0.5}Commissioned (2000-160000) coins to commemorate Chitus {variant:3}{range:0.5}Commissioned (2000-160000) coins to commemorate Victario {variant:4}{range:0.5}Commissioned (2000-160000) coins to commemorate Caspiro Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire Historic

Rarity: UNIQUE Elegant Hubris Timeless Jewel Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Commissioned 148420 coins to commemorate Caspiro Passives in radius are Conquered by the Eternal Empire Historic

Rarity: RARE New Item Kinetic Wand Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.366}LocalAddedColdDamage10__ Prefix: {range:0.613}LocalAddedFireDamage10_ Prefix: {range:0.331}LocalAddedLightningDamage10 Suffix: {range:0.225}LocalIncreasedAttackSpeed5 Suffix: {range:0.662}LocalCriticalStrikeChance6 Suffix: {range:1}LocalCriticalMultiplier3 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 Cannot roll Caster Modifiers Adds 109 to 198 Fire Damage Adds 92 to 173 Cold Damage Adds 17 to 312 Lightning Damage 17% increased Attack Speed 37% increased Critical Strike Chance +24% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier

Rarity: RARE New Item Harmonic Spirit Shield Energy Shield: 79 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.792}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: {range:0.141}SpellDamageOnWeapon7 Prefix: {range:0.965}LocalIncreasedBlockPercentage6 Suffix: {range:0.387}AllResistances6 Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 1 {tags:caster_damage,damage,caster}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Spell Damage 75% increased Chance to Block 87% increased Spell Damage +126 to maximum Life +17% to all Elemental Resistances {crafted}{range:1}+(8-10)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage

Rarity: RARE New Item Lich's Circlet Energy Shield: 431 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.521}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: {range:0.014}LocalIncreasedEnergyShieldPercent7_ Prefix: {range:0.239}LocalIncreasedEnergyShield8 Suffix: {range:0.5}ChaosResist5 Suffix: {range:0.718}FireResist6 Suffix: {range:0.944}ColdResist6 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {tags:damage}{exarch}4% increased Damage per Power Charge {tags:physical,elemental,fire}{eater}6% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage +53 to maximum Energy Shield 92% increased Energy Shield +122 to maximum Life +40% to Fire Resistance +41% to Cold Resistance +28% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: RARE New Item Phantom Mitts Evasion: 283 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 56 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.43}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: {range:1}AddedLightningDamage3 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.782}IncreasedAccuracyNew4 Suffix: {range:1}ChanceToSuppressSpells5__ Suffix: {range:0.944}IncreasedAttackSpeed3 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {exarch}Gain 1 Rage on Attack Hit {eater}Projectiles Pierce 2 additional Targets +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage Adds 2 to 23 Lightning Damage to Attacks 13% increased Attack Speed +328 to Accuracy Rating +121 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE New Item Necrotic Armour Evasion: 3575 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 732 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}LocalBaseEvasionRatingAndEnergyShield8___ Prefix: {range:0.465}LocalIncreasedEvasionAndEnergyShield8 Prefix: {range:1}LocalIncreasedEvasionAndEnergyShieldAndStunRecovery6 Suffix: {range:0.93}ChanceToSuppressSpellsHigh5___ Suffix: {range:0.817}FireResist5 Suffix: {range:0.563}ColdResist5 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {exarch}Gain an Endurance Charge every 12 seconds {tags:physical,elemental,fire}{eater}11% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage +22% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +375 to Evasion Rating 147% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +80 to maximum Energy Shield +34% to Fire Resistance +33% to Cold Resistance 17% increased Stun and Block Recovery

Rarity: RARE New Item Phantom Boots Evasion: 283 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 56 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.461}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Suffix: {range:1}ChaosResist3 Suffix: {range:0.701}ChanceToSuppressSpells5__ Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {tags:elemental,lightning,ailment}{exarch}{range:1}(45-47)% chance to Avoid being Shocked {eater}{range:0.5}(15-17)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +121 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +20% to Chaos Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{custom}{range:1}(25-30)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{custom}{range:0.5}(13-16)% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

Rarity: UNIQUE Yoke of Suffering Onyx Amulet Variant: Pre 3.24.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Lethality {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(10-16) to all Attributes {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:1}+(10-20)% to Fire Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:1}+(10-20)% to Cold Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(20-40)% to Lightning Resistance 30% reduced Duration of Ailments on Enemies {range:0.5}(5-10)% chance to Shock {variant:1}Enemies take 5% increased Damage for each type of Ailment you have inflicted on them {variant:2}{range:1}Enemies take (5-10)% increased Damage for each type of Ailment you have inflicted on them Your Elemental Damage can Shock

Rarity: UNIQUE The Taming Prismatic Ring League: Domination, Nemesis Catalyst: Turbulent CatalystQuality: 20 Variant: Pre 3.0.0 Variant: Pre 3.25.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 LevelReq: 30 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(8-10)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack}{variant:1}15% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack}{variant:2}30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:1}{range:0.5}+(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}+(20-30)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:1}15% increased Elemental Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:2}30% increased Elemental Damage {variant:1}5% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite {variant:2,3}10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite {variant:1}10% increased Damage per Freeze, Shock and Ignite on Enemy {variant:2}20% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments per Freeze, Shock and Ignite on Enemy {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:3}{range:1}(30-40)% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy

Rarity: RARE New Item Amethyst Ring Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.986}IncreasedLife6 Prefix: {range:0.331}WeaponElementalDamage5 Prefix: {range:0.401}AddedLightningDamage7 Suffix: {range:0.894}ChaosResist6 Suffix: {range:0.254}LightningResist7 Suffix: None CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 {tags:chaos,resistance}{range:0.5}+(17-23)% to Chaos Resistance Adds 3 to 48 Lightning Damage to Attacks +99 to maximum Life +43% to Lightning Resistance +35% to Chaos Resistance 39% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,lightning,chaos,resistance}{crafted}{range:0.5}+(13-15)% to Lightning and Chaos Resistances

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt League: Nemesis LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 1 {tags:life}{range:0.5}+(25-40) to maximum Life {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(40-55) to Strength {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(40-55) to Dexterity {tags:life}{range:0.5}+(50-60) to maximum Life {range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Ancestral Vision Viridian Jewel Item Level: 83 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {mutated}+7% chance to Suppress Spell Damage Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value
Rarity: UNIQUE Stormshroud Viridian Jewel Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(10-15)% to Lightning Resistance Modifiers to Chance to Avoid being Shocked apply to all Elemental Ailments

Rarity: RARE New Item Jolting Eshgraft Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}GraftPrefixSharedIncreasedJuiceGained3 Prefix: {range:1}GraftPrefixEshSpellDamage5 Suffix: {range:0.25}GraftSuffixJoltGrantsCriticalStrikeMultiplier3 Suffix: {range:0.599}GraftSuffixSkillLevel3 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {tags:critical}{range:0.5}(4-12)% increased Global Critical Strike Chance Uses level (1-30) Jolting Eshgraft 29% increased Spell Damage 16% increased Graftblood gained Jolt granted by this Graft grants +4% to Critical Strike Multiplier +4 to level of Skills used by this Graft

Rarity: RARE New Item Storming Eshgraft Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.641}GraftPrefixEshSpellDamage8 Prefix: {range:0.5}GraftPrefixSharedIncreasedJuiceGained3 Suffix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}GraftSuffixEshLightningRingBuffAddedLightning2 LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 2 {tags:elemental_damage,damage,elemental,lightning}{range:0.5}Adds (1-4) to (18-20) Lightning Damage Uses level (1-30) Storming Eshgraft 43% increased Spell Damage 16% increased Graftblood gained Radiant Ground created by Skills from this Graft grants Allies on it an additional 5 to 24 added Lightning Damage

Rarity: RARE New Item Molten Xophgraft Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.239}GraftPrefixXophGlobalIncreasedAttackDamage9 Prefix: {range:0.5}GraftPrefixSharedIncreasedJuiceGained3 Suffix: {range:0.313}GraftSuffixCooldownSpeed5 Suffix: {range:0.19}GraftSuffixIncreasedDuration5 LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 2 {tags:defences,armour}{range:0.5}(10-20)% increased Armour Uses level (1-30) Molten Xophgraft 46% increased Attack Damage 16% increased Graftblood gained Skills used by this Graft have 32% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate Skills used by this Graft have 31% increased Skill Effect Duration

Rarity: RARE New Item Viridian Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}ShieldAttackSpeedJewel Prefix: {range:0.798}PercentIncreasedLifeJewel Suffix: {range:1}ManaLeechPermyriadSuffixJewel Suffix: {range:1}PercentIncreasedAccuracyJewel LevelReq: 0 Implicits: 0 5% increased Attack Speed while holding a Shield 14% increased Global Accuracy Rating 7% increased maximum Life 0.4% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched as Mana

Rarity: UNIQUE Progenesis Amethyst Flask Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}(10-20)% reduced Charges per use {range:0.5}(-35-35)% increased Duration When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead

Rarity: MAGIC Doctor's Diamond Flask of the Antelope Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}FlaskChanceRechargeOnCrit3___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffEvasionWhileHealing2 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 35 Implicits: 0 23% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 50% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Wine of the Prophet Gold Flask Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 0 +60 to Maximum Charges {range:0.5}(20-100)% increased Charges per Use Grants a random Divination buff for 20 seconds when used

Rarity: MAGIC Doctor's Jade Flask of the Impala Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}FlaskChanceRechargeOnCrit3___ Suffix: {range:0.873}FlaskBuffEvasionWhileHealing4 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 0 23% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 59% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Doctor's Silver Flask of the Curlew Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}FlaskChanceRechargeOnCrit3___ Suffix: {range:0.5}FlaskBuffCurseEffect3_ Quality: 20 LevelReq: 36 Implicits: 0 23% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 50% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect

PathOfBuilding.Notes: Archetype stage: early_maps Kinetic Blast Elementalist early maps setup focused on fast elemental clear and smooth wand mapping. Applied changes: - Set class=Witch ascendancy=Elementalist - Set level=92 - Selected tree 'update' - Selected primary skill group containing 'Kinetic Blast' - Set main skill to Kinetic Blast in group 1 - Set movement group 3 to: Shield Charge, Faster Attacks, Frostblink - Set config enemyLevel=83 - Set config conditionEnemyChilled=True - Set config conditionEnemyIgnited=True - Set config conditionEnemyShocked=True - Set config usePowerCharges=True - Set config useFrenzyCharges=True
